messages.text: 把ACCT5925 Group Activity 3.1 整理为 Notion 可直接复制或pure text格式发我，我要直接复制粘贴所有的问题，问题之间不要有其他信息，讲解放在最后

# Group Activity 3.1

Not all intangible (incl. ESG) value drivers can be measured and reported in $, or even in physical units. Yet they can be material to enterprise value. So how do we measure, value (where possible) and report them usefully for investors?

a) Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) is one of the world's largest listed companies by market capitalisation. In mid-June 2026 its market capitalisation was approximately $4.32 trillion, while its most recently reported book value (total shareholders' equity at 28 March 2026) was about $106.5 billion—giving a market-to-book ratio of roughly 40.6 (i.e. the market values Apple at about 40 times its accounting net assets). Identify at least five distinct sources of value at Apple that are not captured—or only partly captured—on its balance sheet.

b) Think of one intangible value driver that is self-generated by an entity (i.e. not on its balance sheet) and work through: what is it, and what makes it valuable to the business? How could it be evidenced or measured, and where a $ value is not feasible, what KPI or narrative measure could be used instead?

# 讲解

a) 要求找出至少五项未被资产负债表充分确认的 Apple 无形价值来源，例如品牌、生态系统、客户忠诚度、员工能力、创新能力、供应链关系或数据等。

b) 选择一个企业内部自行形成的无形价值驱动因素，说明它是什么、为何创造企业价值，以及应使用货币估值、量化 KPI 或叙述性信息中的哪一种方式进行衡量和披露。fileciteturn0file2

1. Identify the stakeholder groups of Oceana and Westpac.

2. For each stakeholder group, describe briefly how value is created and how it is measured. Support your discussion with evidence from the report, and for each measure note whether it is a $ amount, a physical/operational unit, a KPI or narrative.

3. Choose two stakeholder relationships (one per company) and explain in 2–3 sentences each why that relationship is an intangible value driver. That is, why managing it well helps the company create or preserve enterprise value, even though the relationship itself does not appear on the balance sheet.

讲解：

阅读范围是 Oceana 2025 Integrated Report 第43–48页的 “Engaging our stakeholders”，以及 Westpac 2025 Annual Report 第16–39页关于为 shareholders、customers、people、environment 等群体创造价值的内容。

第1题要求分别列出两家公司在报告中识别的利益相关者群体。

第2题要求针对每个利益相关者群体说明两点：公司如何为其创造价值；报告使用什么指标衡量这些价值。每项指标还必须分类为 monetary amount、physical/operational unit、KPI 或 narrative，并提供对应报告页码作为证据。

第3题需要从 Oceana 和 Westpac 各选择一个 stakeholder relationship。每个关系用2–3句话说明：该关系为什么属于 intangible value driver，以及良好管理该关系如何提高收入、降低风险、维持经营许可、保护声誉或保存长期企业价值，即使该关系本身不列入资产负债表。fileciteturn0file3
